definitions: Relating to the cutting, polishing, and engraving of precious stones.
Of or relating to an engraver of gems.
Characterized by precision, elegance, and conciseness, especially in language.
Suitable for engraving in stone; monumental.
examples: The lapidary arts require great skill.
He had a lapidary style of writing.
The inscription was a lapidary statement.
She admired the lapidary precision of the carving.
